title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in browser via JS.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps ollama with fzf model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, list, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and async streaming support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels with thread memory and file QA.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for private AI autocomplete, summarization, and semantic search over vault.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama for both embeddings and generation, Chroma for vector store.

title: ollama-gpt-cli
summary: TUI chat client written in Go with bubbletea, markdown rendering, and session save.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama REST API; static binary deployment friendly.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client with GenServer behavior for streaming chat and embedding calls.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate exposing typed endpoints for chat, embed, create, and pull operations.
